channel.title: GitHub Bicep Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Bicep in GitHub

item.title: Azure/azure-quickstart-templates
item.description: Azure Quickstart Templates

item.title: Azure-Samples/ai-rag-chat-evaluator
item.description: Tools for evaluation of RAG Chat Apps using Azure AI Evaluate SDK and OpenAI

item.title: Azure/bicep-registry-modules
item.description: Bicep registry modules

item.title: SonarSource/sonar-scanning-examples
item.description: Shows how to use the Scanners

item.title: Azure/bicep
item.description: Bicep is a declarative language for describing and deploying Azure resources

item.title: Azure-Samples/container-apps-jobs
item.description: This sample shows how to create Azure Container Apps Jobs via Azure CLI and Bicep and how to start and monitor these components.

item.title: Azure-Samples/dotNET-FrontEnd-to-BackEnd-on-Azure-Container-Apps
item.description: This repository demonstrates a typical front-end UI built with ASP.NET and a complementary back-end API.

item.title: Azure-Samples/PetSpotR
item.description: Demo application that showcases a modern, cloud-native application

item.title: Azure-Samples/dotNET-Frontend-AB-Testing-on-Azure-Container-Apps
item.description: Demonstration of how ASP.NET Core developers can use Azure App Configuration's Feature Flags capabilities with Azure Container App revisions to A/B test front end apps.

item.title: Azure-Samples/aca-azure-policy
item.description: This repository contains custom Azure Policies for Azure Container Apps.

item.title: Azure-Samples/react-component-toolkit-openai-demo
item.description: A sample demo for building and testing react components and includes a set of unique features including AI component generation and automatic conversion to Azure APIM Widgets

item.title: Azure-Samples/ctfd-azure-paas
item.description: A scaleable and secure CTFd (Capture the Flag framework) using Azure PaaS

item.title: Azure-Samples/aks-front-door-private-link-service
item.description: This sample shows how Azure Front Door Premium can be set to use a Private Link Service to expose an AKS-hosted workload via NGINX Ingress Controller configured to use a private IP address on the internal load balancer.

item.title: Azure-Samples/app-service-and-sql-database-3-tier-with-private-networking-and-auth
item.description: This repository is an example of deploying a 3 tier ASP.NET Core application to Azure App Service and SQL Database using Bicep and Azure DevOps Pipelines. It implements private networking with private end points and authentication on all tiers with Azure Active Directory.

item.title: Azure-Samples/aks-store-demo
item.description: Sample microservices app for AKS demos, tutorials, and experiments

item.title: Azure/azure-monitor-baseline-alerts
item.description: Azure Monitor Baseline Alerts

item.title: Azure-Samples/msdocs-django-postgresql-sample-app
item.description: A sample Django app using PostgreSQL for the Azure App Service Web App + Database tutorial

item.title: Azure/ALZ-Bicep
item.description: This repository contains the Azure Landing Zones (ALZ) Bicep modules that help deliver and deploy the Azure Landing Zone conceptual architecture in a modular approach. https://aka.ms/alz/docs

item.title: Azure-Samples/openai-chat-backend-fastapi
item.description: A backend for a chat application written in Python FastAPI framework
